why_it_matters: The social needs assessment is documented, but the specific PRAPARE findings—especially infrequent social contact in an 85-year-old—add completeness and could flag isolation risk despite living with family.
An active statin for secondary prevention is central to this IHD/hyperlipidemia visit, and omitting the atorvastatin creates a medication-list discrepancy affecting LDL management decisions.
Documenting counseling on the periodontal–cardiovascular link reinforces the dental referral rationale but has limited direct impact on management.
